---
pagetitle: "Victor Chamot"
page-layout: article
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
sidebar: false

listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  template: postcard.ejs
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
---

<style>
/* Only on homepage: Push content below the hero section */
#quarto-content {
  margin-top: 100vh !important;
}
</style>

<!-- Hero Section -->
```{=html}
<div class="hero-section">
  <div class="hero-content">

    <img src="/bebop.JPG" class="hero-photo" alt="Victor Chamot">

    <h1>Victor Chamot</h1>

    <p class="hero-subtitle">
      PhD Student in Linguistics at the University of Maryland
    </p>

    <div class="hero-bio">

      <p>
        I’m a linguistics graduate student at the University of Maryland,
        working on formal semantics and syntax. My main research examines the
        relationship between <strong>modal flavor</strong> and the syntactic
        properties of complements. I study <strong>modal ellipsis</strong>
        because I believe it provides insight into this relationship. My
        approach is mainly theoretical, complemented by experimental work.
      </p>

      <p style="margin-top: 0.75rem; color: #555; font-size: 0.95em;">
        I also have strong interests in logic, philosophy, psycholinguistics,
        and neurolinguistics, and I am pursuing the NACS certificate alongside
        my PhD. I have a longstanding interest in literature too, mostly
        through listening to friends who chose that other path in studying
        language.
      </p>

      <p style="margin-top: 0.75rem; color: #777; font-size: 0.9em;">
        I’m advised by
        <a href="https://linguistics.umd.edu/directory/valentine-hacquard" target="_blank">Valentine Hacquard</a>
        and
        <a href="https://www.alexanderwilliams.org/home" target="_blank">Alexander Williams</a>,
        and was previously advised in Geneva by
        <a href="https://www.unige.ch/lettres/linguistique/collaborateurs/collaborateurs-de-lenseignement-et-de-la-recherche/professeures-enseignantes/isabelle-charnavel" target="_blank">Isabelle Charnavel</a>
        and
        <a href="https://anoukdieuleveut.wordpress.com" target="_blank">Anouk Dieuleveut</a>.
        I am also grateful to
        <a href="https://www.utkuturk.com/" target="_blank">Utku Türk</a>
        and
        <a href="https://sites.google.com/view/davidmueller/startseite" target="_blank">David Müller</a>
        for their invaluable help.
      </p>

    </div>

    <div class="hero-links">
      <a href="/research.html">research</a>
      <a href="/blog.html">blog</a>

      <a href="/files/cv.pdf" target="_blank" aria-label="CV">
        <i class="ai ai-cv"></i>
      </a>

      <a href="https://github.com/Chmvctr" target="_blank" aria-label="GitHub">
        <i class="bi bi-github"></i>
      </a>

      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/victor-chamot-a469" target="_blank" aria-label="LinkedIn">
        <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
      </a>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-email-link" style="margin-top: -1.5rem; margin-bottom: 2rem;">
      <a href="mailto:chamot@umd.edu"
         style="color: #555; text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 4px;">
        chamot@umd.edu
      </a>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-scroll-down">
      <span>blog posts</span>
      <i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

<!-- Force Quarto to load the Academicons stylesheet -->
<div style="display: none;">
  {{< ai cv >}}
</div>

<div class="main-content-wrapper">

::: {.about-bio}

![](/bebop.JPG){.about-photo}

**Victor Chamot**  
PhD Student in Linguistics  
University of Maryland  

<i>
Advised by
<a href="https://linguistics.umd.edu/directory/valentine-hacquard" target="_blank">Valentine Hacquard</a>
and
<a href="https://www.alexanderwilliams.org/home" target="_blank">Alexander Williams</a>
</i>

<span class="about-research">
*Formal semantics, syntax, modality, and ellipsis, using theoretical and experimental approaches.*
</span>

<span class="about-previous">
*Previously at the University of Geneva, where I worked with
<a href="https://www.unige.ch/lettres/linguistique/collaborateurs/collaborateurs-de-lenseignement-et-de-la-recherche/professeures-enseignantes/isabelle-charnavel" target="_blank">Isabelle Charnavel</a>
and
<a href="https://anoukdieuleveut.wordpress.com" target="_blank">Anouk Dieuleveut</a>.*
</span>

[chamot@umd.edu](mailto:chamot@umd.edu)

:::

::: {.mobile-sidebar-news}

### News

- <time class="sidebar-news__date">2026</time> French Modal Ellipsis and Anaphora at Experiments in Linguistic Meaning 4 · [abstract](https://elm-conference.net/wp-content/uploads/ELM4/Abstracts/paper144.pdf)

[Research →](/research.html){.sidebar-news__more}

:::

</div>

<script src="/files/hero-scroll.js"></script>
